goals.title: Security
goals.objective: OWASP Top 10, RLS policies, CSP headers, auth guards, input validation, secrets exposure, SSRF protections, rate limiting
goals.evidence: Full security review written to .full-review/security.md: 18 findings (1 critical, 4 high, 8 medium, 5 low). Key findings: rate limiter fail-open, guestbook API bypasses Zod validation, AstrBot waterfall chat lacks input validation, CSP unsafe-inline in production, no CSRF protection on mutation endpoints. npm audit clean. No hardcoded secrets found.

goals.title: Architecture
goals.objective: Next.js App Router patterns, component hierarchy, data flow, server/client boundaries, middleware, API structure

goals.title: Code-Quality
goals.objective: TypeScript strictness, error handling, dead code, DRY violations, naming, file organization, dependencies
goals.evidence: Full code quality review: 32 findings (8H,14M,10L). Duplicated parseSseReply/fmtRelative/LANG_COLORS, 14 console.error calls, stale molamakersite(1)/ dir.

goals.title: Database
goals.objective: Schema design, RLS correctness, migration quality, indexes, query patterns, Supabase config
goals.evidence: Full database review: 14 findings (3H,5M,6L). rate_limits no RLS, increment_view silently fails, rate-limit fail-open.

goals.title: Frontend
goals.objective: Accessibility, i18n completeness, CSS architecture, responsive design, animation performance, component API
goals.evidence: Full frontend review: 34 findings (2C,7H,14M,11L). No skip-to-content, opening keyboard trap, redesign bypasses next-intl, ~4.2MB GIFs.

goals.title: DevOps
goals.objective: CI/CD pipeline, Docker configs, CSP/HSTS headers, env vars, build optimization, deploy readiness
goals.evidence: Full devops review: 26 findings (3C,7H,10M,6L). login.json not gitignored, .gitignore corruption, unsafe-inline CSP, :latest Docker, no health checks.

goals.title: Remediation
goals.objective: Fix all critical and high-severity findings from the combined review
goals.evidence: Fixed 4 critical + 10 high + 1 medium findings across 4 batches: (1) Rate limiter fail-closed + tests updated, (2) .gitignore rewritten with missing entries (login.json, photo/, .firecrawl/), (3) Skip-to-content link + opening keyboard dismiss, (4) CSP: unsafe-inline removed from prod, COOP/CORP added, HSTS 2yr, Permissions-Policy expanded, (5) CI audit hardened, (6) validate-posts.js slug bug fixed, (7) engines field added, (8) New migration: RLS on rate_limits, SECURITY DEFINER increment_view, SELECT policy on page_views. All 29 tests pass, TypeScript clean.

goals.title: Ship
goals.objective: Push reviewed code to GitHub, deploy to ECS, verify production health

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-security Security; G002-architecture Architecture; G003-code-quality Code-Quality; G004-database Database; G005-frontend Frontend; G006-devops DevOps; G007-remediation Remediation; G008-ship Ship
